title: Mexican Fromage Fry Quesadilla
description: A twist on traditional quesadilla, filled with gooey fromage and crispy frys, wrapped in a delicious tortilla.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add cumin and chili powder and stir for 1 minute.
Add crispy frys and cook until golden brown.
In a separate pan, melt gooey fromage over low heat.
Place a tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle with melted fromage.
Add crispy frys on half of the tortilla and fold in half.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the fromage is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Repeat with remaining tortillas and filling.
Serve with citrusy salsa and enjoy!
